label: Anomaly playstyle
description: Defines an Anomaly playstyle preset that controls threat sliders, study factor, monolith generation, and codex visibility.

displayThreatFractionSliders.label: Display threat fraction sliders
displayThreatFractionSliders.description: If true, the threat fraction sliders are visible in the storyteller difficulty UI for this playstyle.

overrideThreatFraction.label: Override threat fraction
overrideThreatFraction.description: If true, this playstyle sets a fixed threat fraction instead of using the slider value.

displayStudyFactorSlider.label: Display study factor slider
displayStudyFactorSlider.description: If true, the study factor slider is visible in the storyteller difficulty UI for this playstyle.

generateMonolith.label: Generate monolith
generateMonolith.description: If true, a void monolith is generated on new maps when this playstyle is active.

enableAnomalyContent.label: Enable anomaly content
enableAnomalyContent.description: If true, Anomaly content (entities, incidents, research) is active for this playstyle.

alwaysShowCodex.label: Always show codex
alwaysShowCodex.description: If true, the entity codex is always visible regardless of entity discovery status.
